title: Nostalgic Opulence
description: Ce style imite la photographie argentique 35 mm vintage avec un éclairage cinématographique tamisé et mélancolique, contrastant des ombres chaudes et profondes avec des matériaux très tactiles aux teintes pastel. Il présente une esthétique maximaliste et surchargée, définie par un halo de flou artistique autour des sources lumineuses, un grain de film organique prononcé et une atmosphère à la fois somptueuse et nostalgique.
description_en: This style emulates vintage 35mm film photography with a moody, low-key cinematic lighting setup that contrasts deep, warm shadows against highly tactile, pastel-hued materials. It features a maximalist, cluttered aesthetic defined by soft-focus halation around practical light sources, heavy organic film grain, and a melancholic yet lavish atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style imite la photographie argentique 35 mm vintage avec un éclairage cinématographique tamisé et mélancolique, contrastant des ombres chaudes et profondes avec des matériaux très tactiles aux teintes pastel. Il présente une esthétique maximaliste et surchargée, définie par un halo de flou artistique autour des sources lumineuses, un grain de film organique prononcé et une atmosphère à la fois somptueuse et nostalgique.
prompt: A masterful 35mm film photography emulation of a {{subject}} rendered in a maximalist, 1990s editorial cinematic style. The {{subject}} is centrally positioned within a highly cluttered, lavishly decorated environment that recedes into deep, moody shadows. The rendering mimics a vintage soft-focus lens, creating a shallow depth of field where the background melts into a rich, creamy bokeh, isolating the incredibly tactile details of the {{subject}}. The lighting anatomy is low-key and dramatic, utilizing a cinematic chiaroscuro approach. Warm, glowing practical light sources create a soft, diffused key light that wraps around the contours of the {{subject}}, producing a pronounced blooming halation effect on the highlights and glistening specular reflections on any textured surfaces. The color science features a nostalgic, retro color grade where high-saturation hues, specifically utilizing {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, pop vibrantly against deep, muddy, warm-toned shadows bathed in {{secondary_color}}. The shadows exhibit lifted blacks characteristic of expired analog film stock. The materiality is hyper-tactile, emphasizing contrasting textures like fluffy plushness, intricate lace-like details, and sparkling, light-catching facets. A heavy, organic film grain and subtle chromatic aberration are applied across the entire composition, grounding the image in a melancholic, opulent atmosphere. The environment around the {{subject}} is filled with ornate, baroque-kitsch decorative elements that fade seamlessly into the darkness. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space. Explicitly enforcing NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners, the environment must stretch entirely across the canvas, wrapping the viewer completely in this moody, nostalgic world. 35mm film photography, 1990s editorial, heavy film grain, low-key lighting, halation, cinematic chiaroscuro, maximalist set dressing, soft focus lens, shallow depth of field, vintage color grading, tactile materials, nostalgic opulence, rich bokeh, warm practical lighting, lifted blacks, analog film emulation, dramatic shadows, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame, no canvas, occupying entire space
prompt_removebg: A masterful 35mm film photography emulation of a {{subject}} rendered in a maximalist, 1990s editorial cinematic style, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The {{subject}} is centrally positioned, bringing its lavishly decorated, intricate details into sharp relief against the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The rendering mimics a vintage soft-focus lens, creating a shallow depth of field that isolates the incredibly tactile details of the {{subject}}, allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame and be dynamically cropped by the image boundaries. The lighting anatomy is low-key and dramatic, utilizing a cinematic chiaroscuro approach. Warm, glowing simulated light sources create a soft, diffused key light that wraps around the contours of the {{subject}}, producing a pronounced blooming halation effect on the highlights and glistening specular reflections on any textured surfaces. The color science features a nostalgic, retro color grade where high-saturation hues, specifically utilizing {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, pop vibrantly against deep, muddy, warm-toned shadows bathed in {{secondary_color}}. The shadows exhibit lifted blacks characteristic of expired analog film stock, contrasting beautifully with the solid {{background_color}}. The materiality is hyper-tactile, emphasizing contrasting textures like fluffy plushness, intricate lace-like details, and sparkling, light-catching facets. A heavy, organic film grain and subtle chromatic aberration are applied directly to the {{subject}}, grounding the element in a melancholic, opulent atmosphere. The edges of the {{subject}} exhibit soft photographic transitions, blending naturally into the {{background_color}} while maintaining structural integrity. 35mm film photography, 1990s editorial, heavy film grain, low-key lighting, halation, cinematic chiaroscuro, maximalist details, soft focus lens, shallow depth of field, vintage color grading, tactile materials, nostalgic opulence, warm practical lighting, lifted blacks, analog film emulation, dramatic shadows
background_prompt: A moody, low-key cinematic environment shot on 35mm film, entirely devoid of any central subject. The scene features a maximalist, cluttered arrangement of ornate, baroque-style decorative elements fading into deep, warm shadows. Illuminated by soft, glowing practical light sources that cast a pronounced halation effect, the atmosphere is heavy with nostalgic opulence. Rich {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} highlights catch on textured surfaces like cut glass and plush fabrics, contrasting sharply with the deep, grainy {{secondary_color}} darkness. The entire composition is rendered with a vintage soft-focus lens, heavy film grain, and lifted blacks, creating a rich, creamy bokeh in the distance.
background_prompt_removebg: A moody, low-key cinematic environment shot on 35mm film, entirely devoid of any central subject, composited over a solid {{background_color}} surface. The scene features a maximalist, cluttered arrangement of ornate, baroque-style decorative elements fading into deep, warm shadows. Illuminated by soft, glowing practical light sources that cast a pronounced halation effect, the atmosphere is heavy with nostalgic opulence. A decorative foreground overlay of out-of-focus, sparkling crystal facets and soft, plush textures frames the invisible center, creating profound depth. Rich {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} highlights catch on these textured foreground surfaces, contrasting sharply with the deep, grainy {{secondary_color}} darkness. The entire composition is rendered with a vintage soft-focus lens, heavy film grain, and lifted blacks, with the environmental elements softly transitioning into the flat {{background_color}} backdrop.
